author: Dylan Barker
title: Looking for cover art
content: Would anyone here be willing to make cover art? I’m tight on funds but we can work something out forsure, credit will be given and I’ll share the artwork on all my platforms multiple times! Just reach out if you’re interested:) thank you! Posted June 9, 2026.

author: Kate Kaiser
title: LF artist full body OC
content: Hihi again, looking for an artist to draw my oc. I made a new oc on NEKA and want more artwork of him 🫠 mainly looking for a full body commission! Flexible budget, also i dont mind a long tat^^ tysmm. Posted June 10, 2026.

author: ShinziDBoi
title: Looking for artist for card designs
content: The design of the cards keep drastically changing... I'd love to use real art eventually I am activly looking for artist. Just wallets not. DM or reply. Posted June 11, 2026.
